summary: Comprehensive testing of FitMaxPro fitness application completed successfully. All backend APIs working with 100% success rate. Frontend UI fully functional with proper authentication, navigation, and design compliance.
passed_tests: Workouts API with filtering and detail pages
User subscription and payment checkout endpoints
Landing page with hero section and tetris grid features
Language switching (FR/EN) via globe button - functional
Pricing page with 3 tiers and monthly/annual toggle
Login page with form validation and Google OAuth integration
Navigation between workouts, supplements, and dashboard pages
Dark minimalist theme with proper typography (Barlow Condensed)
Session-based authentication with proper cookie handling
Protected route access control working correctly
